nasb.text: Moreover, you shall not follow the customs of the nation which I will drive out before you, for they did all these things, and therefore I have abhorred them.

esv.text: And you shall not walk in the customs of the nation that I am driving out before you, for they did all these things, and therefore I detested them.

cnv.text: 我從你們面前逐出的各民族，你們不可隨從他們的風俗；因為他們行了這一切事，所以我厭惡他們。

ccb.text: 我要在你们面前赶走那片土地上的各族，你们不要随从他们的习俗。他们做了以上那些事，所以我厌恶他们。
